untranslatable_reason: Signal requires seasonal pattern detection and historical seasonal bias confirmation (3 of last 5 years). This requires external seasonal calendar data and multi-year historical pattern matching that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Properties). The core logic requires: (1) calendar date matching to established seasonal windows (±10 trading days), (2) historical seasonal directional bias analysis across multiple years, and (3) backtesting engine support for seasonal pattern recognition. These require external data sources and pattern matching logic outside standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This seasonal pattern signal cannot be fully translated to the available indicator set. Implementation would require: a seasonal calendar module tracking historical peaks/troughs by date, a multi-year historical analysis engine to confirm seasonal bias in 3+ of last 5 years, and date-based entry condition logic. The placeholder conditions above use trend alignment (close vs sma_200) as a proxy for longer-term bias alignment, but this does not capture the required seasonal window timing and historical confirmation logic.
